care.summary: Compact succulent with white zebra bands; thrives on neglect and bright indirect light.
care.light: Bright indirect; tolerates lower light better than most succulents
care.water: Soak and dry; every 2–3 weeks; less in winter
care.soil: Gritty cactus mix with excellent drainage
care.fertilizer: Dilute cactus feed monthly in growing season
common_issues: Sun scorch in harsh midday glass heat
tips: Use a small pot; shallow roots
Water only when soil is fully dry
Offsets (pups) can be separated after roots form
